passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Apply the promo code for up to four "50%-off" tickets for Spectacle, Peddocks or Georges Island.
source_phrases: Apply the promo code for up to four "50%-off" tickets for Spectacle, Peddocks or Georges Island.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to four people for general admission (Adult, Youth 6-17, Students, and Seniors).
Admission for children 5 and younger is free.
Not valid for special events or for public programming.

passes.title: Christian Science Plaza
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits up to 4 visitors at $5-off each; valid year-round including during the Family Trees program.
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 4 visitors at $5-off each; valid year-round including during the Family Trees program.

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text: Patrons using library passes will pay 1/2 price admission per person (for each of the three people) which still allows access to the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods. Any people accompanying the 3 pass users will still pay the regular admission fee.
source_phrases: Patrons using library passes will pay 1/2 price admission per person (for each of the three people) which still allows access to the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods. Any people accompanying the 3 pass users will still pay the regular admission fee.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
With this pass, one adult 50% discounted admission.
With this pass, children (ages 5-17) $1.00 admission.
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items.
source_phrases: With this pass, one adult 50% discounted admission.
With this pass, children (ages 5-17) $1.00 admission.
No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text: Each pass permits two adults and two accompanied children to tour the 1806 Gore Mansion at the reduced rate of $5 per adult and free for the accompanying children--regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16.
source_phrases: Each pass permits two adults and two accompanied children to tour the 1806 Gore Mansion at the reduced rate of $5 per adult and free for the accompanying children--regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: A one-use library pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to four people.
source_phrases: A one-use library pass gives patrons 50% off admission for up to four people.

passes.title: The House Of Seven Gables
passes.benefit_text: Each library discount coupon admits up to 2 visitors at the discounted admission price of $10 per admission when redeemed at the Holly and David Bruce Visitor Center.
source_phrases: Each library discount coupon admits up to 2 visitors at the discounted admission price of $10 per admission when redeemed at the Holly and David Bruce Visitor Center.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Each coupon reduces admission to $5 per person for up to four visitors for general admission only. 
Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
source_phrases: Each coupon reduces admission to $5 per person for up to four visitors for general admission only.
Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket.
source_phrases: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
A one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary.
With this pass, admission is discounted to $2.00 per visitor over the age of 2.
source_phrases: A one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary.
With this pass, admission is discounted to $2.00 per visitor over the age of 2.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
source_phrases: This ParksPass affords free parking at DCR facilities that charge a parking fee. (The ParksPass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir; the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots; or for camping.)
This ParksPass must be displayed on the rearview mirror in your vehicle at all times while visiting a DCR facility where daily parking fees are charged.
Please check www.massparks.org for a list of applicable parks.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children, ages 7-17, at $10 each (general and special exhibition) . There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission, currently $10. Youths 0 - 6 are admitted to the museum free of charge.
The library makes 2 passes available per day.
Library passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any public programs.
All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls.
Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Hall passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. daily).

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. 
Review the Aquarium's website at www.neaq.org/safety  ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: This coupon allows 50% off standard admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium's website at www.neaq.org/safety  ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: A pass is valid for 4 half-price standard daytime admissions.
Cannot be combined with other offers. Special events or performances may not be eligible.
This discount cannot be combined with other offers.

passes.title: Old Sturbridge Village
source_phrases: Each pass admits a maximum of two adult visitors at a reduced admission fee of $12 per person any day the Museum is open.
Children under age 16 are admitted free.
Admission to Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese House, and special ticketed exhibitions require the pass holder to pay a separate fee.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
A pass admits up to 6 individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult and $12 per child ages 5 - 17. 
One pass available per day.
source_phrases: A pass admits up to 6 individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult and $12 per child ages 5 - 17.
One pass available per day.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Library member rates 2026 :
Adult/Senior - $14.00
Child (3-14) - $11.75
Library Passes are not accepted in the month of OCTOBER.
source_phrases: Library member rates 2026 :
Adult/Senior - $14.00
Library Passes are not accepted in the month of OCTOBER.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits 2 people free (admission is always free for children 4 and under).
source_phrases: Each pass admits 2 people free (admission is always free for children 4 and under).

passes.title: The Spellman Museum Of Stamps And Postal History
The Trustees Of The Reservations
source_phrases: Pass holders will receive free admission to the museum.
One pass allows free admission for up to 5 people per day.
One pass per party, please.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
source_phrases: A pass provides 50% off the admission fee. Each of the (4) cards may be used for up to 2 adults and/or children. Children 17 and under are free.  Pass card holders may enjoy use of the Museum's Library as a resource free of charge.
Passes are not valid for any other applicable discounts on special programming or lectures.
Passes are NOT accepted during Flora in Winter of other special events.

passes.title: Worcester Art Museum
source_phrases: Admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Kids under age 2 are free.
Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only.
No reservations required.
Library passes are not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights.
